expected.summary: Higher timeframes remain bullish, 1H is in a constructive pullback zone, and 15m has confirmed enough strength for a conditional long.

reasons_for_contains: 1D and 4H both hold bullish conditions above EMA200
1H remains above EMA200 and structure has not broken down
15m has stopped making fresh short-term lows
15m reclaimed EMA20 with improving short-term slope
15m local structure has started to strengthen

expected.summary: Higher timeframes remain bearish, 1H is in a constructive rebound zone, and 15m has confirmed enough weakness for a conditional short.

reasons_for_contains: 1D and 4H both hold bearish conditions below EMA200
1H remains below EMA200 and structure has not reversed upward
15m has stopped making fresh short-term highs
15m fell back below EMA20 with weakening short-term slope
15m local structure has started to weaken

vetoes: Higher timeframe regime is not clear enough
conflict_signals: 1D and 4H are not aligned in one direction
1H structure does not align cleanly with the higher timeframe bias
uncertainty_notes: Market regime is not trend-friendly enough for aggressive execution

expected.summary: Higher and mid timeframes are not aligned cleanly enough, so the setup is better treated as noise than as a tradable signal.

reasons_against_contains: 1D and 4H do not agree on a clean directional environment
1H setup is not actionable because higher timeframes are not clearly aligned
15m trigger is not enough to override a neutral higher-timeframe backdrop
